_comment: Rot-prone YouTube Innertube client identity. The iOS app client returns pre-signed stream URLs (no JS cipher / nsig / PoToken) for public videos, which is why it is the resolver's path. These values (clientVersion, userAgent, osVersion) drift as YouTube ships new app builds; when resolution starts failing, scripts/yt-canary.sh refreshes them from yt-dlp's INNERTUBE_CLIENTS. Edit this file, not the Rust source.

ios.userAgent: com.google.ios.youtube/21.02.3 (iPhone16,2; U; CPU iOS 18_3_2 like Mac OS X;)
